topology_summary: 6-node mixed (5 Debian linux + 1 macOS) on 192.168.0.0/24; admin exit-1 plus 5 clients; profile-driven; no Windows target
notes: Profile schema gate rejected the run before any node-stage executed. Codex merges (c0627a6/b54aee8/0da7402/abe5470 brought in via 1a61b33/23ad9bd/98d33e5) added required per-node keys EXIT_REMOTE_SHELL/CLIENT_REMOTE_SHELL/... and the GUEST_EXEC_MODE/SERVICE_MANAGER/RUSTYNET_SRC_DIR family; the committed phase24-macos-smoke profile predates that schema (see phase31_mixed_os_five_node.env for the new shape). discover_local_utm passed: debian-headless-1..5 ready; windows-utm-1 visible in inventory but ssh closed and not targeted. EPERM fix in 66184f4 (allow outbound UDP to RUSTYNET_WG_LISTEN_PORT in linux boot killswitch) was NOT exercised by this run.
regression_notes: Setup gate tightened post codex merges into commit 98d33e5; phase24-macos-smoke profile needs per-node REMOTE_SHELL/GUEST_EXEC_MODE/SERVICE_MANAGER/RUSTYNET_SRC_DIR added to be accepted by current orchestrator. retry35 at 6d3fd1f reached enforce_baseline_runtime then failed with EPERM on UDP send to 192.168.0.201:51820. Fix landed in 66184f4 but cannot be exercised until the profile is updated to the new schema.
